description: A bare `return` (no argument) before a closing brace must not swallow the following statement, and its value (like a natural fall-off-the-end) must be real undefined, not int 0. Previously the parser advanced past `return` onto the block's closing `}` (eating the next statement; object/class method bodies COMPILE_FAILed), and the codegen default was movImm(RET,0) instead of tagged undefined.

expect.stdout:
after-f
9 undefined
undefined
undefined undefined
after-method
undefined undefined
undefined undefined
42
